docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY RICHMOND, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, GLADYS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-10-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED, PLAINTIFF RETURNED TO REPORT THAT DEFENDANT'S CHECK NSF ON 4-8-03.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHMOND, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEWITT, GLADYS $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
